name: Slave Chamber
description:
You find yourself in a room full of slaves.  The slaves, however, have no
chains, shackles, or bondage devices of any kind.  These people are voluntary
slaves to their master . . . the Shogun of Chu.  They don't feel worthy to be
anything else.  Do you?

exits.description: To the north you hear sounds of metalworking.
The west is where you were a minute ago!
